name: mediskin-frontend
comment: MediSkin AI uses Django to serve ALL pages (HTML is Django-rendered).
This vercel.json is therefore NOT used for the main app — the entire
Django project (frontend + backend) is hosted on Render.
This file exists so that IF you ever add a standalone static landing page
or marketing site to the 'public/' folder, Vercel can serve it.
- Static assets (CSS/JS/images): Served by WhiteNoise from Render
- This repo is connected to Render, NOT Vercel, for the main app.
IF YOU WANT A VERCEL FRONTEND IN THE FUTURE:
1. Create a React/Next.js app in a 'frontend-app/' subfolder
3. Update this vercel.json to point outputDirectory to 'frontend-app/.next'
buildCommand: echo 'No build step — static files only'
